settings.heading: Practical art material kits for teaching and creative programs
settings.intro: GlobiSun can help organize product combinations for art classes, camps, workshops, studio programs, and visual learning environments.
settings.body:
School and studio kits are designed around practical use: what students need, what instructors can manage, and what programs can reorder consistently.

Potential kit types

  • Intro painting kits
  • Drawing and marker kits
  • Workshop supply bundles
  • Camp or event art material packs
  • Studio starter inventory sets

We can review quantity, budget, age group, class format, and preferred materials to help prepare suitable sourcing options.

Kit planning inputs

  • Age group or student level
  • Class size or expected number of participants
  • Project duration and frequency
  • Preferred medium such as acrylic, marker, sketching, or mixed media
  • Budget range and acceptable substitutions

For repeating programs, we can review restock-friendly combinations instead of one-time-only item lists.
settings.cta_heading: Send us your product list or sourcing request.
settings.cta_text: We can review product category, quantity, lead time, and suitable B2B options.

settings.title: For educators
settings.text: Support for class materials, age-appropriate tools, and repeatable program supply planning.

settings.title: For studios
settings.text: Flexible product combinations for workshops, private lessons, and group sessions.

settings.title: For programs
settings.text: Options for camps, events, community art projects, and seasonal creative activities.
